Title: The DriveDeck Gallery TV App
Description: Display public Google Drive folders as immersive TV slideshows. Pair your phone to browse thumbnails and control a remote-ready, living-room gallery experience.

Title: The Aspect Astrology Reading Tool
Description: Transform birth details into interactive, immersive readings. This spiritual tool uses an editorial design to move beyond static reports into ongoing, conversational insights.

Title: Document Merge Automation Workspace Extension
Description: Automate workflows by mapping Sheets data into Docs or Slides templates. Effortlessly generate and email PDFs to eliminate manual copy-pasting for repeatable tasks.

Title: Visual HTML Builder Extension Editor
Description: Import and edit any live webpage within a visual workspace. This tool bypasses standard URL limitations to allow direct manipulation of real, authenticated interfaces.

Title: PocketEncode Video Conversion Utility Tool
Description: Take control of video compression with this browser-based MP4 converter. Precisely adjust file size and output quality through a guided, transparent upload-to-download workflow.

Title: DriveLink Direct
Description: Instantly converts Google Drive share links into clean, direct-download URLs for images and files. Built to remove friction from asset handoffs and embeds.

Title: WebP Forge
Description: An in-browser image converter that turns PNGs, JPGs, SVGs, and more into WebP with tunable quality, scale, blur, and metadata controls plus live size comparisons.

Title: ToneSplit Posterizer
Description: Converts photos to high-contrast black & white, posterizes tonal shades, and exports each layer separately for print, stencils, and screen workflows.

Title: Lottie Canvas
Description: Preview .lottie and JSON animations, tweak colors, and remove elements to shape clean motion previews without hopping between editors.
